info.Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.

pockets.heading: Anomic Agent: Blood Raider Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by ElonJobs:This page doesn't appear on categories. Thu, 11 Nov 2021 23:10 UTC
Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
Recommended ship types: Assault Frigate, Pirate Faction Frigate

pockets.heading: General Tips
lines: Burner NOS will drain typical AF capacitor in just several seconds;
This Burner has very large armor buffer;

pockets.heading: Kiting Tips
lines: Burner NOS range is slightly bellow 10km;
Burner has no AB nor MWD, max nominal speed is around 380m/s;

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: CCP said that there is a slight chance of getting faction stuff in the loot. If you don't get faction modules, the loot is mostly made of Meta modules.

info.Extras: Web/Scramble (Burner Succubus). You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.

pockets.heading: Anomic Agent: Sansha Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by ElonJobs:This page doesn't appear on categories. Thu, 11 Nov 2021 23:15 UTC
Extras: Web/Scramble (Burner Succubus). You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
Recommended ship types: Assault Frigate, Pirate Faction Frigate

pockets.heading: Agent mission description
lines: A single individual, a rogue element of Sansha’s Nation, has struck out on their own. We don't know why, but we want you to hunt them down.
They have all scans open, so we can't go there in force. We've acquired their coordinates and need someone to sneak in and take them out. It's you against them.
Only frigate sized ships can gain entry to the hideout, so don’t try to bring anything bigger.

This pirate will be flying an extremely fast, shield boosted Succubus frigate. He uses lasers loaded with Scorch frequency crystals. Survivors of his previous attacks claim that he likes to orbit his opponents at around 15km at extremely high speeds. He always flies with a Stasis Webifier and a Warp Scrambler fit.

pockets.heading: General Tips
lines: Burner traits almost pin you in place as they use faction web/scram.
Burner orbits at extremely high velocity (approx 3000m/s) at range (approx 15km).
Rocket users - recommend to use target painter and rocket explosion velocity rigs.
Turret users - recommended to use tracking boosting mods/rigs and target painter.
Burner will switch targets to drones and will very quickly destroy them.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: CCP report that there is a slight chance of getting faction loot. If you don't get faction modules, the loot is mostly made of Meta modules.

pockets.heading: Bounty
lines: approx 2,000,000 ISK for the Burner + mission bonus.

info.Extras: Web/Scramble (Burner Daredevil). You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.

pockets.heading: Anomic Agent: Serpentis Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by JudicianNar Mon, 06 Feb 2017 13:33 UTC

Recommended ship types: Assault Frigate, Pirate Faction Frigate

pockets.heading: General Tips
lines: Daredevil traits almost pin you in place as burner use faction web/scram.
Burner orbits at extremely high velocity at close range (under 5km).
Rocket users require double web and target painter.
Turret users require double web and tracking boosting mods.
Burner will switch targets to drones and will very quickly destroy them.

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: CCP report that there is a slight chance of getting faction loot. If you don't get faction modules, the loot is mostly made of Meta modules.

info.Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.

pockets.heading: Anomic Team: Vengeance Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by Roktaal:added ECM type Mon, 29 Oct 2018 15:49 UTC
Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
Recommended ship types: Kestrel, kiting long range frigate (25km+)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: All ships aggro on warp-in. Burner Inquisitors are only remote repairing each other and Burner Vengeance and will not deal any damage to you.

pockets.heading: Kiting Tips
lines: set the default orbit distance before you enter the mission site;
set the orbit to whatever the range of your guns/launchers can support, but do not set it inside Burner Vengeance's webbing range;
Burners can and usually do have "faction" webs, so watch out when choosing your orbit range;
Activate your Microwarp Drive and start orbiting the Burner Vengeance as soon as you land. Otherwise, you'll end up being webbed and scrambled because Burner Vengeance is pretty fast (750-800 m/s);
Destroy Burner Inquisitors first as they remote repair each other and the Burner Vengeance;

Burner Vengeance uses Defender Missiles. If you notice that you are not hitting it with your own missiles, try turning off your launchers and turning them on again. This may place your firing cycle between the firing cycles of Burner Vengeance's Defender missiles;

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: CCP said that there is a slight chance of getting dedspace stuff in the loot. If you don't get dedspace modules, the loot is mostly made of Meta 4 modules.

info.Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.

pockets.heading: Anomic Team: Hawk Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by Roktaal:added ECM type Mon, 29 Oct 2018 15:48 UTC
Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
Recommended ship types: Kestrel, kiting long range frigate (25km+)

pockets.heading: Kiting Tips
lines: set the default orbit distance before you enter the mission site;
set the orbit to whatever the range of your guns/launchers can support, but do not set it inside Burner Hawk's webbing range;
Burners can and usually do have "faction" webs, so watch out when choosing your orbit range;
Activate your Microwarp Drive and start orbiting the Burner Hawk as soon as you land. Otherwise, you'll end up being webbed and scrambled because Burner Hawk is pretty fast;
Destroy Burner Bantams first as they remote repair each other and the Burner Hawk;

Burner Hawk uses Defender Missiles. If you notice that you are not hitting it with your own missiles, try turning off your launchers and turning them on again. This may place your firing cycle between the firing cycles of Burner Hawk's Defender missiles;

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: CCP said that there is a slight chance of getting faction stuff in the loot. If you don't get faction modules, the loot is mostly made of Meta 4 modules. Burner Hawk is known to drop meta Ballistic Control Systems (Muon Coil, Cross-linked), among other loot.

info.Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
info.Recommended ship classes: Kestrel, Harpy, kiting long range frigate (25km+)

pockets.heading: Anomic Team: Jaguar Burner, Level 4
lines: Last edited by Roktaal:added ECM type Mon, 29 Oct 2018 15:47 UTC
Extras: You can not enter mission site in anything larger than a Frigate hull.
Recommended ship types: Hawk, kiting long range frigate (25km+)

pockets.heading: Pocket 1
lines: All ships aggro on warp-in. Burner Burst are only remote repairing each other and Burner Jaguar and will not deal any damage to you.

pockets.heading: Kiting Tips
lines: set the default "keep at distance" before you enter the mission site;
set the "keep at distance" to whatever the range of your guns/launchers can support, but do not set it inside Burner Jaguar's webbing range;
Burners can and usually do have "faction" webs, so watch out when choosing your orbit range;
Activate your Microwarp Drive and "keep at distance" the Burner Jaguar as soon as you land. Otherwise, you'll end up being webbed and scrambled because Burner Jaguar is pretty fast (750-820 m/s);
Destroy Burner Bursts first as they remote repair each other and the Burner Jaguar;

Burner Jaguar uses Defender Missiles. If you notice that you are not hitting it with your own missiles, try turning off your launchers and turning them on again. This may place your firing cycle between the firing cycles of Burner Jaguar's Defender missiles;

pockets.heading: Loot
lines: The loot is mostly made of Meta 4 modules but faction loot is possible.
